story: Roswell, 1998. I wash dishes at the Blue Moon Diner and hid a sleek future pistol under the fridge; it vanished. A British woman, Sara, arrived holding a twin pistol and my own. She said I’d endangered realities and couldn’t let me make it worse. She raised the gun and shot me. Moments later, the fat chef asked her where I’d gone. “She swore nobody believes her,” she said, “and ran out.” The woman scanned the room. “I hear there’s a vacancy at the Blue Moon Diner,” she said.
implausible_knowledge: She raised the gun and shot me.
question: When the British woman points out there’s a vacancy at the diner, what will the fat chef most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Call the police to report her for shooting the narrator and refuse to hire her.
answer_without_knowledge: Let her fill the vacancy and start working in the narrator’s place.
